system.description:
The psyker establishes rudimentary control over animals (Bestial trait). Can affect a number of animals equal to his Psy Rating. If the Opposed Willpower Test succeeds, target animals must follow psychic commands. As a Reaction each Round, the psyker may give a single animal a simple command ('Come here', 'Guard me', 'Run', 'Attack'). If threatened, injured, or commanded contrary to its nature, the animal may make a further Opposed WP Test with +10 to break free.

Focus Power Test: Opposed Willpower

XP Cost: 200
